# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net9.0 and migrating the hosting model from the legacy `CreateHostBuilder` / `Startup.cs` pattern to the modern minimal hosting model using top-level statements in Program.cs.

**Progress**: 0/1 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%
